candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. Relative to selected COGS bucket 'Material cost', this row cannot be clearly attributed to COGS.
Separate operating D&A-like line above EBIT, but not labelled as belonging to cost of sales. Attribution to the selected COGS bucket 'Material cost' is unclear.
Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. It should not be added to COGS without clearer bucket attribution.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Material cost'. The visible D&A rows are generic operating lines, not explicitly tied to cost of sales, so the conservative anti-double-counting choice is not to add any of them to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above the financial section. It was excluded from the earlier XSGA bucket selection and appears at the same hierarchy level as the selected operating expense buckets, so it should be added separately later rather than treated as already embedded in those selected rows.

Explicit separate operating depreciation-related line above the financial section. It is shown separately from the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately. It does not look like a child label under another selected parent row.
Explicit separate operating D&A line above the financial section. It is not one of the selected XSGA rows and appears alongside them, so it should be added separately later.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Operating expenses', 'Other operating expenses', 'Personnel expenses', and 'Research & Develop.' The separate lines 'Depreciation', 'Depreciation leasing assets', and 'Amortisation' appear above EBIT at the same operating level and were explicitly excluded in the earlier mapping notes, so they should be added separately to XSGA. No single summary D&A row covering all three is visible, so include the separate rows.
